nodes.name: Every 6 Hours
nodes.notes: Checks for new reviews every 6 hours (at midnight, 6am, noon, 6pm). Adjust the cron expression to check more or less frequently.

nodes.name: Business Configuration
nodes.notes: CONFIGURE THIS NODE: Enter your Google Place ID (find it at https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/places/web-service/place-id), business name, owner email, and Google Places API key.

nodes.name: Fetch Google Reviews
nodes.notes: Fetches the latest reviews from Google Places API. The API returns the 5 most recent reviews. We filter for new ones in the next node.

nodes.name: Filter New Reviews Only
nodes.notes: Uses n8n static data to remember which reviews have already been processed. Only passes through genuinely new reviews. The workflow stops here if there are no new reviews (no unnecessary AI calls or notifications).

nodes.name: Route by Sentiment
nodes.notes: Routes reviews based on star rating. 1-3 stars go to the 'needs careful response' path (true). 4-5 stars go to the 'positive response' path (false). This ensures negative reviews get more empathetic, careful responses.

values.content:
You are a business owner responding to a NEGATIVE or NEUTRAL customer review. Your business is {{ $json.businessName }}.

Rules:
- Be empathetic and acknowledge their concern
- Never be defensive or dismissive
- Apologize for their experience
- Offer to make it right (invite them to contact you directly)
- Keep it under 100 words
- Be genuine, not corporate-sounding
- Never argue with the reviewer
- Include your first name as the sign-off (use 'The {{ $json.businessName }} Team' if preferred)

nodes.name: AI - Empathetic Response
nodes.notes: Generates a careful, empathetic response for negative/neutral reviews (1-3 stars). Uses lower temperature (0.6) for more consistent, measured responses.

values.content:
You are a business owner responding to a POSITIVE customer review. Your business is {{ $json.businessName }}.

Rules:
- Thank them warmly and specifically
- Reference something specific from their review
- Express genuine appreciation
- Keep it under 80 words
- Be warm and personal, not generic
- Invite them back or mention something they might enjoy next time
- Vary your responses - don't start every response with 'Thank you so much'

nodes.name: AI - Grateful Response
nodes.notes: Generates a warm, grateful response for positive reviews (4-5 stars). Uses higher temperature (0.8) for more varied, natural-sounding responses.

nodes.name: Format Negative Review Data
nodes.notes: Combines the original review data with the AI-generated response for negative reviews.

nodes.name: Format Positive Review Data
nodes.notes: Combines the original review data with the AI-generated response for positive reviews.

nodes.name: Log Review & Response to Sheet
nodes.notes: Logs every review and its suggested AI response to a tracking sheet. Create a sheet named 'Reviews' with columns: Date, Reviewer, Rating, Sentiment, Review Text, Suggested Response, Urgency, Action Needed, Response Posted.

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.sentiment === 'negative' ? '🚨 URGENT' : $json.sentiment === 'neutral' ? '⚠️ Attention' : '⭐ Great' }}: New {{ $json.rating }}-Star Review from {{ $json.authorName }}

nodes.name: Email Alert to Owner
nodes.notes: Sends an email notification to the business owner with the review details and suggested AI response. Urgent subject line for negative reviews, calm subject for positive ones. The owner can copy/paste the response directly to Google Maps.
